entry.title: IDC 89303321DEM000061 (P00040) awarded to IDAHO ENVIRONMENTAL COALITION LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Refer to Section H contract clause, H.51 TASK ORDERING PROCEDURE

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PIID 89243222FEMTO03 & 89243223FEMTO04 THIS MODIFICATION AWARDS TASK ORDER 4 OPTION A (TO-4A) ACCELERATED RETRIEVAL PROJECT (ARP)/SUBSURFACE DISPOSAL AREA (SDA) DEMOLITION AND ORGANIC CONTAMINATION VADOSE ZONE (OCVZ) WELL ABANDONMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.
